title: cerastium alpinum lusus arcticum
intro: Cerastium alpinum lusus arcticum, also known as Arctic Mouse-Ear, is a perennial plant species within the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cerastium alpinum lusus arcticum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and improving respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared through herbal infusions or tinctures, often used in folk medicine to address these health concerns.
